title: iBomber 2
short_description: Sequel bombing run over North Africa and Europe, 1943–1944.
description: iBomber 2, the awesome sequel to the Smash Hit #1 game, played by million's of people. iBomber 2 is an amazing, arcade styled bombing game based in North Africa and Europe between 1943 and 1944. You play a heroic bomber pilot searching out key enemy targets to destroy!
